items.title: Debugging, logging and final project: reject the misconception
items.prompt: Which statement is source-aligned for Java: Beginner to Intermediate and corrects this misconception? Adding print statements until the symptom disappears is sufficient debugging evidence and production logging may include any value useful to a developer.

feedback.incorrect: That choice preserves the misconception. Debug from a reproducible failure and explicit hypothesis, inspect the causal state, protect sensitive data, and preserve the fix with an automated regression test.
